emergency_definition: Emergency includes flooding, active alarm, and power outage.
Non-emergency requests are logged with caller name, number, and issue summary.
Non-emergency work orders should still gather name, phone, address, and issue details.

non_emergency_routing_rules.routing_summary: Non-emergency work orders should still gather name, phone, address, and issue details.

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: If transfer fails, confirm on-call dispatch callback within 10 minutes.

integration_constraints: Never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade; dispatch creates them manually.
Do not create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade and do not auto-close open tickets.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms emergency status immediately. For emergencies, it captures name, number, and address before transfer. For non-emergencies, it logs details and confirms next-business-hours follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: During office hours (Monday-Sunday 12:00 AM-11:59 PM ET), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
notes: Generated from demo input: account_005_demo.txt | Updated with onboarding data
